addTablePoint.description: Adds a new table point (x and y are normalized coordinates).

getCurrentlyDisplayedIndex.description: Returns the current ruler position (from 0 to 1).

getTablePointsAsArray.description: Returns an array containing all table points ([[x0, y0, curve0], ...]).

getTableValueNormalised.description: Returns the value of the table at the given input (0.0 ... 1.0).

linkTo.description: Makes this table refer to the given table.

reset.description: Resets the table with the given index to a 0..1 line.

setContentCallback.description: Sets a callback that is being executed when a point is added / removed / changed.

setDisplayCallback.description: Sets a callback that is being executed when the ruler position changes.

setTablePoint.signature: void setTablePoint(int pointIndex, float x, float y, float curve)
setTablePoint.description: Sets the point with the given index to the values.

setTablePointsFromArray.description: Sets the table points from a multidimensional array ([x0, y0, curve0], ...]).
